text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk down the hallway on a very rainy day to
find...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I-I'm sorry, Cafe. I must have brought you bad
luck...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is all my fault. If I hadn't asked you to run
with me, it wouldn't have started pouring...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hmm? What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I missed what you said... I was too
focused...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: On this drawing.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Draw... ing?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's like a spell... that lets me imagine up a whole
new world in a window, but only on rainy days...
It's fun...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The world in this window is ending though. It will
disappear back into the glassy void... without
ever knowing happiness.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Because the black cat's beloved friend isn't
here.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The black cat... is alone. With no one to rescue
them, unable to express their true feelings...
They're doomed to fade away.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What? Th-that's so sad...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Because I wasn't able to draw the black cat's
friend, the calico cat...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-then I'll draw it for you! I think I'm okay at
drawing things...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, let's see... It's a calico cat, so I'll draw the
patterns on its body, then its whiskers, and for its
tail...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...U-um! The calico cat has a curled tail.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Aww, that's just like the black cat! Hehe, they
really must be the best of friends!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Cafe! I've been look'n for you! The dorm
lead'r told us t'hurry on back because of the
heavy rain...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Goodness gracious! What'n ador'ble picture
you've got there!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I think it's cute too. Rice made a wonderful
world full of happiness...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What? B-but all I drew was the calico cat...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The black cat looks happy... because you drew
their calico cat friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I'm also very happy. We got to draw together
thanks to the heavy rain.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks to the heavy rain?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Well... Yukino's waiting for me, so I better...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! We should head back before the dorm lead'r
gives us an earf'l!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, um!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-thank you! Uh, I may have brought a bunch
of rain...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I had lots of fun, thanks to you, Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. And I had fun with you. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And if you don't mind... I'd like you to teach me
how to draw a calico cat sometime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe cares dearly for her shadow
world, no matter the circumstances. But today,
she's able to create a sweet memory from the
backdrop of pouring rain.
